race.comment: Competitive. WILD RUBY (14) didn't have the best of it at Ballarat first up and has placed 2/2 second up. Better suited and races well at this track. Rates best and expect quick improvement. TABLE TWENTYEIGHT (5) resumed at Ballarat over a shorter sprint, beaten 2.3L after a tough run. There was a lot to like about that, and he's sure to enjoy the step-up to 1200m. FAERYWOOD (1) resumes gelded and has shown enough to say he's a chance. Won his latest jumpout and draws an inside barrier.Has plenty of scope for improvement. SUPER DIRTY (13) resumed much improved, beaten 1.3L over 1000m at Ballarat, where he stalked the lead. Has jumped out well since, but the longer sprint is some query from a wide gate. HERE COMES WOZZA (2) draws wide but has the numbers to be around the mark if presented forward.
